name: AstrBot
description: Agentic IM Chatbot infrastructure that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
summaryZh: Agentic IM Chatbot infrastructure that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨ 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
